productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Hip Hop Analog Black Watch
description: Straight out of fastrack& rsquo s Hip Hop collection, this analog wrist watch is a great buy for those who enjoy performance and style. Freaky and with excellent touches, this watch makes for a fabulous and fashionable daily wear for those who enjoy that gothic touch to their outfit.Case diameter: 45 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: Round Metallic case that is partly glossy and partly matted, with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Numbering of units of the first half hour engraved in gothic style on glossy half of the dial Leather strap for comfort and style Black dial with the danger skull dominating the top half of the dial, a few hours mentioned in gothic print , brand name at 7 o& rsquo clock position and 2 o& rsquo clock and 10 o& rsquo clock positions represented by a diamond shape Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Tang clasp to keep the watch firm in place as a belt buckle Water resistance at 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when swimming or snorkling
